channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Model 3 Price Drop in Europe — Up to €4,000 Off with Tesla Bonus (March 2026)
item.description: Tesla has introduced the Tesla Bonus discount program in Europe, cutting Model 3 prices by up to €4,000 in select markets. Combined with referral code carlo719460 and government EV subsidies, the Model 3 can now be purchased for under €25,000 in some countries.

item.title: Cheapest Country to Buy a Tesla in Europe 2026 — Price Comparison by Country
item.description: Complete 2026 price comparison for Tesla Model 3 and Model Y across 10 European countries, including Norway, Switzerland, Germany, France and Portugal. Covers government incentives and cross-border buying rules.

item.title: Tesla FSD Early Access in Europe 2026: Invites Rolling Out Now, Rebrand & V14 Lite Explained
item.description: Tesla FSD Early Access invites are now rolling out to European owners (March 2026). Netherlands RDW approved FSD under Article 39 in February 2026. Tesla renamed FSD to Navigate on Autosteer in 2026.2.9. V14 Lite coming to HW3/AI3 owners in June 2026.

item.title: Tesla in Norway 2026: The Complete Buyer's Guide
item.description: Norway is the world's most EV-advanced market. This guide covers Tesla prices in NOK, tax exemptions, charging infrastructure and how to save kr 5,500 with a referral code.

item.title: Tesla Referral Program March 2026 Update: What Changed (And What Didn't)
item.description: Tesla overhauled its US referral program in March 2026 — removing Model S/X and cutting loyalty discounts. But in Europe, the €500 Supercharging credit is still fully active through March 31.

item.title: Tesla Roadster Europe 2026 — April 1 Reveal, Price & EU Availability
item.description: Everything European buyers need to know about the Tesla Roadster 2026: April 1 reveal date, specs, price estimates, and EU delivery timeline.

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Denmark 2026 — €500 Supercharging (Anbefalingskode)
item.description: How to use a Tesla referral code in Denmark in 2026. Tesla anbefalingskode carlo719460 gives Danish buyers €500 in free Supercharging credits on a new Model 3 or Y.

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Finland 2026 — €500 Supercharging (Suosittelukoodi)
item.description: How to use a Tesla referral code in Finland in 2026. Tesla suosittelukoodi carlo719460 gives Finnish buyers €500 in free Supercharging credits.

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Ireland 2026 — €500 Free Supercharging
item.description: How to use a Tesla referral code in Ireland in 2026. Code carlo719460 gives Irish buyers €500 in free Supercharging credits on a new Model 3 or Model Y.

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Turkey 2026 — 1,000 km Free Supercharging
item.description: How to use a Tesla referral code (tavsiye kodu) in Turkey (Türkiye) in 2026. Use carlo719460 to get 1,000 km free Supercharging on your new Tesla.

item.title: Tesla Lieferzeit Europa 2026: Wie lange dauert es wirklich?
item.description: Aktuelle Tesla Lieferzeiten in Europa 2026. Model 3 und Model Y — alle Varianten mit realistischen Wartezeiten, Tipps zur schnelleren Lieferung und Referral-Code zum Sparen.

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Poland 2026 — Kod Polecenia Tesla, Save €500
item.description: How to use a Tesla referral code in Poland in 2026. Tesla Kod Polecenia carlo719460 gives you up to €500 in Supercharging credits or Tesla credits.

item.title: Should I Buy a Tesla in Europe in 2026? (Honest Buyer's Guide)
item.description: An honest analysis of whether to buy a Tesla in Europe now or wait in 2026. Covers 0% APR deadline, referral savings, FSD approval status, delivery times, and market signals.

item.title: Tesla Model 3 Preis Schweiz 2026: Alle Varianten, Kosten & Spartipps
item.description: Tesla Model 3 Preise in der Schweiz 2026: Standard ab CHF 36'990, Long Range ab CHF 44'990, Performance ab CHF 58'490. Alle Varianten im Vergleich.

item.title: Tesla Model Y L Europe 2026 — The 6-Seater Coming Soon?
item.description: Everything European buyers need to know about the Tesla Model Y Long Wheelbase (Model Y L) — extended body, 6 seats, and potential EU launch in 2026.

item.title: Tesla FSD on Hardware 3 in Europe 2026: What AI3 Owners Need to Know
item.description: Tesla FSD V14 Lite is coming to HW3/AI3 owners in Europe by summer 2026. Complete guide to compatibility, features, and timeline.

item.title: Tesla Model 3 Standard Range Europe 2026: Price, Range & How to Save €500
item.description: Tesla's most affordable Model 3 is now available in Europe from ~€38,990. 534km WLTP range and a competitive price point to challenge BYD. Use referral code carlo719460 to save €500.

item.title: Tesla UK Trade-In Bonus: Save £3,750 Before March 31 — How It Works
item.description: Tesla UK is offering a £3,750 trade-in bonus on Model 3 and Model Y until March 31, 2026. Stack it with referral code carlo719460 for maximum savings.

item.title: Tesla Model Y vs BYD Atto 3 Europe 2026: Which EV Should You Buy?
item.description: Tesla Model Y vs BYD Atto 3 in Europe 2026: full comparison of range, price, charging, features and value.

item.title: Tesla Maintenance Costs in Europe 2026: Complete Ownership Guide
item.description: How much does it really cost to maintain a Tesla in Europe? Year-by-year breakdown of service costs, tire replacement, battery warranty, and comparison with BMW, Audi, and Mercedes.

item.title: Tesla Giga Berlin: Gewerkschaftswahl gescheitert, Robotaxi kommt — Was das für Käufer bedeutet
item.description: IG Metall verliert bei der Betriebsratswahl in Giga Berlin. Gleichzeitig plant Tesla die Robotaxi-Produktion in Grünheide. Was das für Tesla-Käufer in Europa bedeutet.

item.title: Tesla FSD Supervised in Europe 2026: Netherlands RDW Approval Explained
item.description: Tesla FSD Supervised received RDW Extended Type Approval in the Netherlands on March 4, 2026 — the first EU country. Here is what that means for buyers across Europe, which countries are next, and how the referral program interacts with FSD.

item.title: Tesla March 2026 Deals: 0% APR Financing + €500 Referral Bonus — Buy Before March 31
item.description: Tesla is offering 0% APR financing across Europe through end of March 2026. Combine with referral code carlo719460 for €500 off. Here's everything you need to know.

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Portugal 2026 — Save €500 on Your New Tesla
item.description: How to use a Tesla referral code in Portugal in 2026. Tesla código de referência carlo719460 gives you up to €500 in Supercharging credits.

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Switzerland 2026 — Save CHF 500 on Your New Tesla
item.description: How to use a Tesla referral code in Switzerland in 2026. Tesla Empfehlungscode Schweiz carlo719460 gives you up to CHF 500 in Supercharging credits or Tesla credits.

item.title: Best Country to Buy a Tesla in Europe 2026 | Country-by-Country Comparison
item.description: Comparing Tesla prices, incentives, and tax benefits across 8 European countries in 2026. Find out where your Tesla referral code carlo719460 saves you the most.

item.title: Code Parrainage Tesla 2026 : Guide Complet
item.description: Découvrez comment utiliser un code parrainage Tesla en 2026 pour obtenir des kilomètres gratuits et des avantages exclusifs.

item.title: Tesla Leasing Europe 2026: Real Monthly Costs [10 Countries Compared]
item.description: Model Y from €349/mo, Model 3 from €299/mo. Compare real 2026 Tesla lease rates across Germany, Netherlands, France, UK & more — hidden fees exposed + referral bonus tip.

item.description: How to use a Tesla referral code in Sweden in 2026. Tesla rekommendationskod carlo719460 gives Swedish buyers free Supercharging credits or Tesla credits.

item.title: Tesla in Spain 2026: Prices, Grants, Superchargers & Buying Guide
item.description: Everything you need to know about buying a Tesla in Spain in 2026 — MOVES III grants, Model 3 & Y prices, Supercharger network, and how to use a referral code to save more.

item.title: Tesla UK 2026: Prices, Grants, Superchargers & Buying Guide
item.description: Everything you need to know about buying a Tesla in the UK in 2026 — prices in GBP, Plug-in Grant eligibility, Supercharger coverage, and how to save with a referral code.

item.title: Tesla Charging in Europe 2026: The Complete Owner's Guide
item.description: Everything Tesla owners need to know about charging in Europe — Supercharger network, CCS adapters, public chargers, and costs by country.

item.title: Tesla Model 3 Highland Europe 2026: Prices by Country
item.description: Model 3 Highland prices compared across 10+ EU countries (EUR, CHF, GBP). Real-world range, specs, charging costs — and the cheapest country to buy in.

item.title: Tesla Model Y Long Range vs Standard Range: Which to Buy in Europe (2026)?
item.description: Tesla Model Y Long Range vs Standard Range compared for European buyers — real-world range, price difference, charging costs, and which is worth it.

item.title: Tesla Spring 2026: New Updates, Prices and What European Buyers Need to Know
item.description: Spring 2026 is a big moment for Tesla in Europe. New prices, software updates, country incentives, and the best time to buy. Everything European buyers need to know.

item.title: Tesla Is Discontinuing the Model S and Model X: What It Means for Buyers
item.description: Tesla is ending production of the Model S and Model X in Q2 2026. Here's why it's happening, what it means for owners, and what comes next.

item.title: Tesla Model Y 7-Seater Now Available in Europe for €2,500 — Worth It?
item.description: Tesla launches the 7-seat Model Y option in Europe. Here's what you get, why it's controversial, and whether you should wait for the Model YL.

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Europe 2026: Complete Guide to Free Benefits
item.description: Everything you need to know about Tesla referral codes in Europe 2026.

item.title: Tesla Software Update 2026 [March]: Every EU Change Tracked
item.description: All 2026 Tesla updates for Europe in one place — from Grok AI (2026.2.6) to Comfort Braking (2026.8). Which models get what, when, and what's still US-only. Updated weekly.
